title: Chat Emojis
description: A simple way of typing emojis in Minecraft using the Discord codes! E.g. :skull: or :sob: or :wilted_rose:
body:
If you look at the emojis in discord it says the text for them. :skull: would be the skull emoji and :rolling_on_the_floor_laughing: is the rolling on the floor laughing emoji. So yeah, very simple and makes it easy to type emojis on servers.

I was going to not upgrade this to 1.21.11 but when I was upgrading, I noticed that there is literally no other emoji mod that works for 1.21.11 (apart from 1 but it doesnt have :sob: and they used the wrong :skull:).



Here is a list of all of the emojis that work (some of these will not work in older versions of the mod):

**:skull:**

**:sob:**

**:wilted_rose:**

**:100:**

**:thumbs_up:**

**:thumbs_down:**

**:smile:**

**:frown:**

**:heart:**

**:broken_heart:**

**:nerd:**

**:fire:**

**:cool_guy:**

**:joy:**

**:smiling_face_with_tear:**

**:blush:**

**:upside_down_face:**

**:wink:**

**:heart_eyes:**

**:smiling_face_with_3_hearts:**

**:yum:**

**:stuck_out_tongue_closed_eyes:**

**:zany_face:**

**:face_with_raised_eyebrow:**

**:sunglasses:**

**:star_struck:**

**:smirk:**

**:pleading_face:**

**:cry:**

**:weary:**

this was a **:triumph:**, I'm making a note here: "HUGE SUCCESS"

**:exploding_head:**

**:flushed:**

**:scream:**

**:fearful:**

**:thinking:**

**:shushing_face:**

**:melting_face:**

**:no_mouth:**

**:grimacing:**

**:hushed:**

**:open_mouth:**

**:zipper_mouth:**

**:money_mouth:**

**:star:**

**:fire_engine:**

**:crab:**
